text:
惑星ハルコタンに封印された
悪しき神『禍津』。
その封印強化を進めるスクナヒメ。
だが、その儀式を邪魔するかのように
黒の民の大軍が押し寄せる。
――――――――――――――――――――
失敗条件/戦闘不能後、リタイアを選択

惑星ハルコタンに封印された悪しき神『禍津』。
その封印強化を進めるスクナヒメ。
だが、その儀式を邪魔するかのように
黒の民の大軍が押し寄せる。

Sukunahime dedicated her efforts to the
strengthening of the seal thqt kept the
malicious Harbinger of Calamity confined
to Harukotan. However, she was
approached by a Nightfaller host who
seemed intent on disrupting her ceremonies.
----------------------------------------------------
You will fail this quest if you become incapacitated
or retire.

Sukunahime dedicated her efforts to the strengthening of the
seal that kept the malicious Harbinger of Calamity confined
to Harukotan. However, she was approached by a Nightfaller
host which seemed intent on disrupting her ceremonies.
Defend the site of the seal!
白ノ領域　封印の場
惑星ハルコタン　白ノ領域　封印の場
